name: ofb-order-csv-exporter
description: Export individual or date-range Oregon Food Bank Primarius orders as CSV files.

scripts.test: node test/export-core.test.js && node test/batch-core.test.js && node test/page-bridge.test.js && node test/page-bridge-batch.test.js && node --check content.js && node --check batch-content.js && node --check page-bridge.js && node --check export-core.js
